headlines.description: R elegation-threatened Ipswich Town secured a shock 2-1 win at Bournemouth in the Premier League on Wednesday, three days after the hosts lost 2-1 to Manchester City in the FA Cup quarter-finals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Struggling Ipswich get shock win at Bournemouth

events.name: Aston Villa at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Marcus Rashford scored his first league goal for Aston Villa who earned a comfortable 3-0 win at Brighton & Hove Albion on Wednesday, which moved the visitors ahead of the hosts in the Premier League standings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rashford scores again as Villa beat Brighton

headlines.description: Jack Grealish scored his first Premier League goal for 16 months as Manchester City eased to a 2-0 win over relegation-threatened Leicester City at the Etihad Stadium on Wednesday to keep alive their hopes of Champions League qualification for next...
headlines.shortLinkText: Grealish ends Prem goal drought in Man City win

headlines.description: Alexander Isak scored his 20th Premier League goal of the season and Sandro Tonali fired a stunning winner as Newcastle United beat Brentford 2-1 at St James' Park on Wednesday to boost their bid for a Champions League place.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tonali, Isak strike as Newcastle edge Brentford

headlines.description: Substitute Matheus Franca struck in stoppage time to deny Premier League bottom side Southampton a rare victory, as Crystal Palace snatched a 1-1 draw at St Mary's Stadium on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Franca nets late as Palace deny Soton 3rd win

headlines.description: Liverpool continued their march towards the Premier League title with a 1-0 victory over Everton in a scrappy Merseyside derby.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool restore 12-point lead in win vs. Everton
